About
=====

:link_to_translation:`zh_CN:[中文]`

This is documentation of **Your Project**, the framework to develop applications for your target platform.

.. figure:: ../_static/about-doc.png
    :align: center
    :alt: Your Project Integrated Development Framework
    :figclass: align-center

    Your Project Integrated Development Framework

Your Project provides toolchain, API, components and workflows to develop applications using Windows, Linux and macOS operating systems.

.. only:: feature_a

    .. note::

        This content is only visible when the ``feature_a`` tag is enabled. This demonstrates conditional content rendering in Sphinx.

        You can use the ``.. only::`` directive to show or hide content based on:

        - Custom tags (like ``feature_a``)
        - Build modes (``html``, ``latex``, ``text``)
        - Platform conditions

.. only:: html

    .. tip::

        This tip is only visible in HTML builds. You can use this to provide format-specific information.
